mapper.select: select i.item_seq AS itemSeq, i.user_seq AS userSeq, u.user_id AS partnerId, st.company_name AS partnerName, i.category_seq AS categorySeq, i.item_code AS itemCode, i.item_name AS itemName, i.spec AS spec, i.unit_price AS unitPrice, i.item_image AS itemImage from items i join users u on i.user_seq = u.user_seq join stores st on u.user_seq = st.user_seq where u.user_type = 'PARTNER' order by st.company_name, i.item_seq

select s.stock_seq AS stockSeq, s.user_seq AS userSeq, s.stock AS stock, s.quantity AS quantity, s.safety_stock AS safetyStock from stocks s join users u ON s.user_seq = u.user_seq where u.user_id = #{loginId} and u.user_type = 'BUSINESS' and ( s.stock like concat('%', #{itemName}, '%') OR #{itemName} like concat('%', s.stock, '%') )
